Off Calendar Jul-10-2019 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Dec-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Dec-05-2018 Continued To Dec-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-11-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Roddick for and with Priscilla Roberson.

Mr. Roddick stated that he has nothing further and that there are no objections that he is aware of. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed (subject to review of the order). Bond is set at $150,000.00. Status on close of estate is set for July 10, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
